message:
test(encoding): add tests for plain Parquet encoding

Add 6 new tests (11 total) covering:
- readFloat (f32 values)
- readInt96 (deprecated timestamp format)
- readFixedLenByteArray (fixed-length binary)
- readBytes and skip (raw data access)
- UnexpectedEndOfData error handling
- readBooleans with partial byte (non-multiple of 8)
